flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northshore Technical Community College rose 123% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.4k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northshore Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northshore Technical Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northshore Technical Community College rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (56.5% → 62.2%).
